name: EAGLE FINANCIAL SERVICES INC
business: Eagle Financial Services, Inc. provides retail and commercial banking services through its subsidiary Bank of Clarke, including demand, savings, time deposits, consumer, mortgage, and commercial loans. It also offers wealth management services including trust and brokerage, and has investments in title insurance (Bankers Title Shenandoah, LLC) and insurance brokerage (Bearing Insurance Group, LLC). The bank serves customers in the Shenandoah Valley of Virginia, Northern Virginia, and Frederick, Maryland.
sellsTo: Retail banking customers in Virginia and Maryland

exposures.sentence: The Company s operations may be adversely affected by cybersecurity risks.
The Bank offers telephone banking, internet banking, and mobile banking to its customers.
The financial services industry is continually undergoing rapid technological change with frequent introductions of new technology-driven products and services, including artificial intelligence.
At December 31, 2025, loans secured by real estate totaled $1.1 billion and represented 77.4% of the Company's loan portfolio, net of net deferred loan costs and premiums.

The brokerage area offers advisory services and a broad selection of investment products, including individual retirement accounts, mutual funds, tax-deferred annuities, 529 college savings plans, life insurance, long term care insurance, brokerage certificates of deposit, among other brokerage services.

catalysts.event: Opened first full-service branch in Fairfax County
catalysts.sentence: During the third quarter of 2025, the Bank opened its first full-service branch in Fairfax County, providing an opportunity to expand strategically and deliver its distinctive brand of community banking to Fairfax County.
